toolSpec.name: validateBarcode
toolSpec.description: Validates the received product barcode against the confirmed product ID using image processing system. Returns match status, problem types, and resolution status.

po_number.description: Purchase order number associated with the shipment

confirmed_product_id.description: 13-digit product identification code confirmed by vendor

received_product_bar_code.description: File path to the barcode image of the received product

toolSpec.name: calculateQuantityVariance
toolSpec.description: Calculates quantity variance between ordered, confirmed, and received quantities. Returns variance percentage, problem types, and chargeable status.

po_number.description: Purchase order number for the shipment

ordered_quantity.description: Number of units originally ordered on the PO

confirmed_quantity.description: Number of units confirmed by vendor before shipping

received_quantity.description: Actual number of units received at warehouse

toolSpec.name: verifyWarehouseLocation
toolSpec.description: Validates whether a shipment was delivered to its intended warehouse location. Returns location match status and problem types.

po_number.description: Purchase order number associated with the shipment

intended_warehouse_id.description: ID of the warehouse where the shipment was supposed to be delivered

actual_warehouse_id.description: ID of the warehouse where the shipment was actually delivered

toolSpec.name: assessPackageCondition
toolSpec.description: Evaluates the physical condition of received packages using damage detection algorithm. Returns package condition assessment and problem types.

po_number.description: Purchase order number associated with the shipment being assessed

package_image_path.description: File system path to the package image analyzed for damage

toolSpec.name: calculateChargeback
toolSpec.description: Calculates vendor chargeback amounts based on identified shipment problems. Returns chargeable status and charge amount.

po_number.description: Purchase order number for the shipment

problem_type.description: Array of identified problems with the shipment

ordered_quantity.description: Number of units originally ordered on the PO

received_quantity.description: Actual number of units received at warehouse

unit_cost.description: Cost per unit for chargeback calculation

toolSpec.name: updateResolutionStatus
toolSpec.description: Updates the resolution status of a shipment based on identified problems and current status. Returns updated resolution status and timestamp.

po_number.description: Purchase order number associated with the shipment

problem_type.description: Array of identified problems for the shipment

current_status.description: Current resolution status of the shipment

toolSpec.name: generateProblemReport
toolSpec.description: Generates a comprehensive problem classification report for shipment issues. Returns complete report with problem summary, chargeback details, and resolution information.

po_number.description: Purchase order number associated with the shipment

problem_type.description: List of identified problems with the shipment

charge_amount.description: Total chargeback amount calculated for the problems

resolution_status.description: Current status of the problem resolution process
